user.title: Select your Viatom BP2
user.description: Choose the blood pressure monitor to add.

bluetooth_confirm.title: Confirm Viatom BP2
bluetooth_confirm.description: Found **{name}** — do you want to set it up?

abort.no_devices_found: No Viatom BP2 devices found. Make sure the device is powered on and within range of your BLE proxy.

init.title: User Name Mapping
init.description: Enter friendly names for each discovered user ID. These are Viatom cloud account numbers that appear in BP records. Leave blank to show the numeric ID.

abort.no_users_found: No user IDs discovered yet. Take a measurement first, then return here.
